title: Import attendence of zoom with integration or zapier
excerpt: We make zoom courses and would like to import attendees in monday with monday integration better but if not zapier could also work.

posts.author: elena (elena)
posts.cookedHtml: We make zoom courses and would like to import attendees in monday with monday integration better but if not zapier could also work.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @elena ,

That’s an awesome use case I would definitely recommend using a 3rd-party tool like Integromat or Zapier, if you find that the native integration option isn’t quite what you are looking for.

You can find more info on how to set this up below:

  • How to create an integration with Zapier
  • Zapier JSON formatting examples
  • How to create an integration with Integromat

If you have any specific questions about setting this up, feel free to share with us within the community and we’ll do our best to provide helpful advice

-Alex

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
